# TikTok Ad Specs — GMR-0021 (Short-Form Video Creators)

**Created**: 2026-05-20
**Owner**: outlier-campaign-agent
**Purpose**: TikTok Ads Manager API access is not yet provisioned (as of 2026-05-20). Creatives for TikTok are generated by `scripts/generate_secondary_creatives.py` and saved to Drive at `GMR-0021/tiktok/<geo_cluster>/<angle>.png`. Diego / Bryan upload them manually via TikTok Ads Manager until API access lands.

---

## Creative dimensions (canonical)

| Spec | Value |
|---|---|
| **Aspect ratio** | 9:16 |
| **Pixel dimensions** | 1080 × 1920 |
| **File format** | PNG (preferred) or JPG |
| **Max file size** | 1 MB (PNG) / 500 KB (JPG) |
| **Color space** | sRGB |
| **Subject framing** | Centered horizontally; head at the 40–45% vertical line; waist-up |

## Safe zones — what TikTok's UI overlays cover

TikTok renders native UI on top of every in-feed creative. Anything in these zones risks occlusion:

| Zone | Pixels from edge | What lives here |
|---|---|---|
| **Top** | 0 – 140 px | Username pill, "Sponsored" tag |
| **Bottom** | 1520 – 1920 px (~400 px tall) | Username + CTA + caption + sound icon |
| **Right** | 950 – 1080 px (~130 px wide) | Like / comment / share rail |
| **Safe creative area** | ~ 60 × 270 → 950 × 1520 | Headline, logo, key subject pixels |

Our generator already enforces this: headline is placed below 140 px (TikTok safe-top) and the photo subject is composed so faces/hands sit above the bottom 400 px.

## Copy limits (TikTok-native fields, NOT image overlay)

These are entered in TikTok Ads Manager when the ad is uploaded — they appear NEXT TO the creative, not on it:

| Field | Limit | Outlier convention |
|---|---|---|
| **Display name** | 2–20 chars | "Outlier" |
| **Ad text / caption** | Up to 100 chars | Pull from the variant's `ad_description` field; trim if over |
| **CTA button** | Enum only | Use one of: `Apply Now`, `Sign Up`, `Learn More`, `Get Started` |
| **Landing page URL** | UTM-tagged | Build via `src/utm_builder.py` — same as LinkedIn arm |

## Single-image standalone is restricted

**Critical**: TikTok's Ad Format Policy states static single images must not occupy more than 50% of a video ad's runtime. A pure static single-image in-feed ad is **not** a viable standalone format.

**Workaround**: upload as a **Carousel Ad** instead — 2 to 35 image slides per ad, all 9:16, fully supported in TikTok Ads Manager.

Recommended slide pattern for recruiting cohorts (per agency benchmarks):

| Slide | Content |
|---|---|
| 1 | Hook headline — the role / opportunity in 5 words |
| 2 | Key qualifications (1–3 bullets) |
| 3 | Payment rate + remote framing |
| 4 | Outlier brand mark + CTA |

For GMR-0021 the generator produces ONE 9:16 PNG per (geo × angle). To build a Carousel Ad you can:
- Use the same PNG for slides 1 + 2 (Outlier brand cards) and recycle it across cohorts, OR
- Pair the FB-folder PNG (4:5) cropped to 9:16 as slide 2

## Targeting suggestions for "Short-Form Video Creators"

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| Country geos | Use the geo cluster the creative is in (e.g., `anglo` = US, GB, CA, AU, IE, NZ, PR) |
| Age | 18–34 |
| Gender | All |
| Interest categories | Content Creation, Video Editing, Social Media Marketing |
| Behavior | "Engaged with Video Editing content (30 days)" |
| Device | Mobile only (TikTok desktop traffic is negligible) |
| Placements | Auto / In-Feed only — disable Pangle network |

## Budget + bidding

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| Campaign objective | Conversions (Sign-up) or Traffic (LP visits), depending on funnel stage |
| Bid strategy | Cost cap @ $25 CPA for English-speaking, $10 for emerging markets |
| Daily budget | $50/day starting; scale up at 0.5× CPA target |
| Optimization event | Page View or Complete Registration (set via TikTok Pixel) |

## QC checklist before launch (per creative)

- [ ] PNG is exactly 1080 × 1920 px
- [ ] No text rendered inside top 140 px (would clash with username pill)
- [ ] No subject pixels in bottom 400 px (would clash with CTA strip)
- [ ] Headline copy is ≤ 6 words, ≤ 40 chars (Outlier brand guideline)
- [ ] No banned vocabulary (see `CLAUDE.md` table — `training`, `compensation`, `interview`, etc.)
- [ ] Logo + brand mark visible above the bottom safe-zone line
- [ ] UTM-tagged URL is set in the TikTok ad URL field

## When API access lands

Once Diego or Bryan provisions a TikTok Business app + access token, the next step is to add `src/tiktok_api.py` implementing the `AdPlatformClient` ABC from `src/ad_platform.py` (mirror the shape of `src/meta_api.py`). Add `"tiktok"` to `ENABLED_PLATFORMS` in Doppler and the live pipeline will pick it up.

Open questions to resolve at that point:

1. Carousel Ad multi-slide upload format via the API (Marketing API v1.3 endpoint: `/open_api/v1.3/creative/portfolio/`)
2. Whether Spark Ads (boosted organic posts) are in scope — requires a TikTok Business account with organic content
3. Pixel event mapping (which `EVENT_TYPE` corresponds to Outlier's conversion definition)

- TikTok Ad Format & Functionality Policy: https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/tiktok-ads-policy-ad-format-and-functionality
